title: Renovate vendoring still does not work correctly

comments.body: I’m sorry to say this is getting old quickly. At what point do we revert the vendoring and `go.work.sum` inclusion, hoping (working on??) for a later Renovate improvement?
@jankaluza WDYT? I think revert sounds best for now.

Yeah. I've opened discussion for this topic Renovate upstream with no response yet. I will try to fix it myself in case we won't get any response by the end of the week. But this will take weeks to fix, get into upstream and get deployed on github. So +1 with revert.

So what is the status here? The failing renovate PRs are still annoying as hell.
Can someone just revert back the to non vendor version?
I will revert to non-vendor version.
